title: Throwable bricks
description: ACT LIKE A DELINQUENT: THROW BRICKS AND SMASH PEOPLE'S WINDOWS.
body:
# Throwable bricks
Why waste arrows when you have a perfectly good piece of baked clay? Throwable Bricks brings a new level of "civilized conversation" to Minecraft. If you’ve ever wanted to settle a dispute with a Villager or just give a Creeper a headache from a distance, this mod is for you!

Key Features:
- 
- Brick Physics: Right-click to launch a standard brick at your enemies. It’s heavy, it’s fast, and it hurts!
- Property Damage: Finally, some realism! Thrown bricks will shatter glass blocks and glass panes. Watch out where you aim!
    
![gf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ibEOWq4Y/images/ff57c53e2ee7f242593b32fa8ab3c9ec7f81f7b6.gif)
